TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: aitsu a venan kemasi Lunguan i ɫavek a mangtjez, aya a tjautsikel.
S.PHON: aiʦu a vənan kəmasi ɭuŋuan i ʎavək a maŋcəz, aja a cauʦikəɭ.
S.FORM: aicu a venan kemasi Lunguan i ljavek a mangtjez, aya a tjaucikel.
S.PHON: aiʦu a vənan kəmasi ɣuŋuan i ʎavək a maŋʦəz, aja a ʦauʦikəɣ.
S.TRANSL: Deer came from Lunguan by the sea, according to the story.

S.FORM: saka ka patagiɫ a kemasi i ɫavek, inika tja sunasian.
S.PHON: saka ka patagiʎ a kəmasi i ʎavək, inika ca sunasian.
S.FORM: saka ka patagilj a kemasi i ljavek, inika tja sunasian.
S.PHON: saka ka patagiʎ a kəmasi i ʎavək, inika ʦa sunasian.
S.TRANSL: When they began to come from the sea, we didn’t kill them.

S.FORM: azua mamaw tua udjudju anan; saka inika tjen a djemameq nu kemuang itjen.
S.PHON: azua mamaw tua uɉuɉu anan; saka inika cən a ɉəmaməq nu kəmuaŋ icən.
S.FORM: azua mamaw tua udjudju anan; saka inika tjen a djemameq nu kemuang itjen.
S.PHON: azua mamaw tua uɉuɉu anan; saka inika ʦən a ɉəmaməq nu kəmuaŋ iʦən.
S.TRANSL: They were still like soft sprouts(?); and we didn’t catch them when we were shooting.

S.FORM: azua ini anan a san satsemeli.
S.PHON: azua ini anan a san saʦəməɭi.
S.FORM: azua ini anan a san sacemeli.
S.PHON: azua ini anan a san saʦəməɣi.
S.TRANSL: We didn’t then consider them as wild game.

S.FORM: nu tsuatsuay anga saka namasan venan anga, sa puquvaɫ anga, sa putsuqaruɫquɫan anga, tsaɫeqiɫ anga a kula, vaik anga sema gadu a djemavats.
S.PHON: nu ʦuaʦuaj aŋa saka namasan vənan aŋa, sa puquvaʎ aŋa, sa puʦuqaruʎquʎan aŋa, ʦaʎəqiʎ aŋa a kuɭa, vaik aŋa səma gadu a ɉəmavaʦ.
S.FORM: nu cuacuay anga saka namasan venan anga, sa puquvalj anga, sa pucuqaruljquljan anga, caljeqilj anga a kula, vaik anga sema gadu a djemavac.
S.PHON: nu ʦuaʦuaj aŋa saka namasan vənan aŋa, sa puquvaʎ aŋa, sa puʦuqaRuʎquʎan aŋa, ʦaʎəqiʎ aŋa a kuɣa, vaik aŋa səma gadu a ɉəmavaʦ.
S.TRANSL: After a long time when they had become deer, with hair and hooves and hard feet, they walked up to the mountains.

S.FORM: avan anga zazua tja qaɫupen anga, sa tja kuangi anga.
S.PHON: avan aŋa zazua ca qaʎupən aŋa, sa ca kuaŋi aŋa.
S.FORM: avan anga zazua tja qaljupen anga, sa tja kuangi anga.
S.PHON: avan aŋa zazua ʦa qaʎupən aŋa, sa ʦa kuaŋi aŋa.
S.TRANSL: After that we hunted them and shot them.

S.FORM: avan anga zazua patagiɫ a malap itjen tua venan.
S.PHON: avan aŋa zazua patagiʎ a maɭap icən tua vənan.
S.FORM: avan anga zazua patagilj a malap itjen tua venan.
S.PHON: avan aŋa zazua patagiʎ a maɣap iʦən tua vənan.
S.TRANSL: It was then we began to take deer;

S.FORM: saka malap anga tua zua venan a vetsivetsikan.
S.PHON: saka maɭap aŋa tua zua vənan a vəʦivəʦikan.
S.FORM: saka malap anga tua zua venan a vecivecikan.
S.PHON: saka maɣap aŋa tua zua vənan a vəʦivəʦikan.
S.TRANSL: and we took the spotted deer.

S.FORM: saka nu uqaɫay malualu a tequng; saka nu vavayan inika putequng.
S.PHON: saka nu uqaʎaj maɭuaɭu a təquŋ; saka nu vavajan inika putəquŋ.
S.FORM: saka nu uqaljay malualu a tequng; saka nu vavayan inika putequng.
S.PHON: saka nu uqaʎaj maɣuaɣu a təquŋ; saka nu vavajan inika putəquŋ.
S.TRANSL: The males had 8-point antlers, and the females had no antlers.

S.FORM: sa liaw anga, sa vaik anga djaravats a penulingelingetj tua kadjunangan.
S.PHON: sa ɭiaw aŋa, sa vaik aŋa ɉaravaʦ a pənuɭiŋəɭiŋəc tua kaɉunaŋan.
S.FORM: sa liaw anga, sa vaik anga djaravac a penulingelingetj tua kadjunangan.
S.PHON: sa ɣiaw aŋa, sa vaik aŋa ɉaRavaʦ a pənuɣiŋəɣiŋəʦ tua kaɉunaŋan.
S.TRANSL: Their number increased, and they roamed all over the land.

S.FORM: manu metsevung tua zua takets.
S.PHON: manu məʦəvuŋ tua zua takəʦ.
S.FORM: manu mecevung tua zua takec.
S.PHON: manu məʦəvuŋ tua zua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: A deer met a muntjac.

S.FORM: "kasinu sun a djaravaravats?" aya azua takets.
S.PHON: "kasinu sun a ɉaravaravaʦʔ" aja azua takəʦ.
S.FORM: "kasinu sun a djaravaravac?" aya azua takec.
S.PHON: "kasinu sun a ɉaRavaRavaʦ?" aja azua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: “Where have you come from roaming about?” said the muntjac.

S.FORM: "imaza ken angata a djaravaravats."
S.PHON: "imaza kən aŋata a ɉaravaravaʦ."
S.FORM: "imaza ken angata a djaravaravac."
S.PHON: "imaza kən aŋata a ɉaRavaRavaʦ."
S.TRANSL: “I roam all round here.”

S.FORM: "aku izua zazua namaitazua? aku putequng tua liaw? aku vetsivetsikan?" aya zazua takets.
S.PHON: "aku izua zazua namaitazuaʔ aku putəquŋ tua ɭiawʔ aku vəʦivəʦikanʔ" aja zazua takəʦ.
S.FORM: "aku izua zazua namaitazua? aku putequng tua liaw? aku vecivecikan?" aya zazua takec.
S.PHON: "aku izua zazua namaitazua? aku putəquŋ tua ɣiaw? aku vəʦivəʦikan?" aja zazua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: “Why is he like that, with lots of horns and spots?” said the muntjac.

S.FORM: vaik a sema tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: vaik a səma cu kavuɭuŋan.
S.FORM: vaik a sema tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: vaik a səma ʦu kavuɣuŋan.
S.TRANSL: And it went to Kavulungan mountain.

S.FORM: saka izua zazua venan a nakemizing izua i tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: saka izua zazua vənan a nakəmiziŋ izua i cu kavuɭuŋan.
S.FORM: saka izua zazua venan a nakemizing izua i tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: saka izua zazua vənan a nakəmiziŋ izua i ʦu kavuɣuŋan.
S.TRANSL: On Kavulungan there was the ancestor (? OA) of the deer.

S.FORM: saka "izua zazua ku sinitsevungan, saɫinga tua tjalupung nua venan azua mareunem.
S.PHON: saka "izua zazua ku siniʦəvuŋan, saʎiŋa tua caɭupuŋ nua vənan azua marəunəm.
S.FORM: saka "izua zazua ku sinicevungan, saljinga tua tjalupung nua venan azua mareunem.
S.PHON: saka "izua zazua ku siniʦəvuŋan, saʎiŋa tua ʦaɣupuŋ nua vənan azua maRəunəm.
S.TRANSL: “I’ve met someone who wants a 6-pointer deer’s hat.

S.FORM: vaik aken a tjeqaɫa," aya azua takets.
S.PHON: vaik akən a cəqaʎa," aja azua takəʦ.
S.FORM: vaik aken a tjeqalja," aya azua takec.
S.PHON: vaik akən a ʦəqaʎa," aja azua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: I’m off on a journey,” said the muntjac.

S.FORM: sa tjalupungan a tjalupung nua mareunem, sa vaik azua a tjeqaɫa a sema zua tua venan malualu.
S.PHON: sa caɭupuŋan a caɭupuŋ nua marəunəm, sa vaik azua a cəqaʎa a səma zua tua vənan maɭuaɭu.
S.FORM: sa tjalupungan a tjalupung nua mareunem, sa vaik azua a tjeqalja a sema zua tua venan malualu.
S.PHON: sa ʦaɣupuŋan a ʦaɣupuŋ nua maRəunəm, sa vaik azua a ʦəqaʎa a səma zua tua vənan maɣuaɣu.
S.TRANSL: He put on the 6-pointer’s hat, and went on a journey to the 8-pointer deer.

S.FORM: manu maɫavar azua: "aku liaw a su tequng? keḍi a niaken," aya zazua.
S.PHON: manu maʎavar azua: "aku ɭiaw a su təquŋʔ kəɖi a niakən," aja zazua.
S.FORM: manu maljavar azua: "aku liaw a su tequng? kedri a niaken," aya zazua.
S.PHON: manu maʎavaR azua: "aku ɣiaw a su təquŋ? kəɖi a niakən," aja zazua.
S.TRANSL: Then he thought: “Why have you got lots of points on your antlers? There are few on mine,” he said.

S.FORM: vaik a tsemikel a sema tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: vaik a ʦəmikəɭ a səma cu kavuɭuŋan.
S.FORM: vaik a cemikel a sema tju Kavulungan.
S.PHON: vaik a ʦəmikəɣ a səma ʦu kavuɣuŋan.
S.TRANSL: He went back to Kavulungan.

S.FORM: "ken a kizuɫu anan a ku tequng a ku tjalupung," aya zazua takets.
S.PHON: "kən a kizuʎu anan a ku təquŋ a ku caɭupuŋ," aja zazua takəʦ.
S.FORM: "ken a kizulju anan a ku tequng a ku tjalupung," aya zazua takec.
S.PHON: "kən a kizuʎu anan a ku təquŋ a ku ʦaɣupuŋ," aja zazua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: “I want to add more points to my hat,” said the muntjac.

S.FORM: manu "neka.
S.PHON: manu "nəka.
S.FORM: manu "neka.
S.PHON: manu "nəka.
S.TRANSL: “No.

S.FORM: idan patsikelu," aya zua mareunem.
S.PHON: idan paʦikəɭu," aja zua marəunəm.
S.FORM: idan pacikelu," aya zua mareunem.
S.PHON: idan paʦikəɣu," aja zua maRəunəm.
S.TRANSL: Give it back,” said the 6-pointer.

S.FORM: saka "upai ku paɫiɫiay azua su siayaya."
S.PHON: saka "upai ku paʎiʎiaj azua su siajaja."
S.FORM: saka "upai ku paljiljiay azua su siayaya."
S.PHON: saka "upai ku paʎiʎiaj azua su siajaja."
S.TRANSL: “Right, I’ll go and see what you are talking about.”

S.FORM: sa vaik anga zazua a tjeqaɫa.
S.PHON: sa vaik aŋa zazua a cəqaʎa.
S.FORM: sa vaik anga zazua a tjeqalja.
S.PHON: sa vaik aŋa zazua a ʦəqaʎa.
S.TRANSL: And he went off on a journey;

S.FORM: ɫakua inika metsevung.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika məʦəvuŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua inika mecevung.
S.PHON: ʎakua inika məʦəvuŋ.
S.TRANSL: but didn’t meet anyone.

S.FORM: "aku neka?" aya zazua mareunem ka tsemikel anga.
S.PHON: "aku nəkaʔ" aja zazua marəunəm ka ʦəmikəɭ aŋa.
S.FORM: "aku neka?" aya zazua mareunem ka cemikel anga.
S.PHON: "aku nəka?" aja zazua maRəunəm ka ʦəmikəɣ aŋa.
S.TRANSL: “Why was there noone?” said the 6-pointer when he got back.

S.FORM: "nasa su lutjuken aken.
S.PHON: "nasa su ɭucukən akən.
S.FORM: "nasa su lutjuken aken.
S.PHON: "nasa su ɣuʦukən akən.
S.TRANSL: “It seems you were just fooling me.

S.FORM: ɫakua kisedjami a su tjalupung, nasaya su varung.
S.PHON: ʎakua kisəɉami a su caɭupuŋ, nasaja su varuŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua kisedjami a su tjalupung, nasaya su varung.
S.PHON: ʎakua kisəɉami a su ʦaɣupuŋ, nasaja su vaRuŋ.
S.TRANSL: You just thought ‘I’ll borrow your hat’.

S.FORM: iru anga ka ui a pasedjam tjanusun," aya zua mareunem tua takets.
S.PHON: iru aŋa ka ui a pasəɉam canusun," aja zua marəunəm tua takəʦ.
S.FORM: iru anga ka ui a pasedjam tjanusun," aya zua mareunem tua takec.
S.PHON: iRu aŋa ka ui a pasəɉam ʦanusun," aja zua maRəunəm tua takəʦ.
S.TRANSL: I certainly won’t lend it to you,” said the 6-pointer to the muntjac.

S.FORM: manu qemaung anga zua takets, aya.
S.PHON: manu qəmauŋ aŋa zua takəʦ, aja.
S.FORM: manu qemaung anga zua takec, aya.
S.PHON: manu qəmauŋ aŋa zua takəʦ, aja.
S.TRANSL: So the muntjac cried, they say.

S.FORM: avan nu sika maɫetutsu anga temulats a takets "aa aa", aya a
S.PHON: avan nu sika maʎətuʦu aŋa təmuɭaʦ a takəʦ "aa aa", aja a
S.FORM: avan nu sika maljetucu anga temulac a takec "aa aa", aya a
S.PHON: avan nu sika maʎətuʦu aŋa təmuɣaʦ a takəʦ "aa aa", aja a
S.TRANSL: tjautsikel.
